hooks.command: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const c=s?.tool_input?.command;if(!c){process.exit(0)}if(/^rtk\s/.test(c)||/&&\s*rtk\s/.test(c)){process.exit(0)}const skip=/^(cd |mkdir |echo |cat <<|source |export |\.|set )/.test(c);if(skip){process.exit(0)}const parts=c.split(/\s*(&&|\|\||;)\s*/);const out=parts.map((p,i)=>{if(i%2===1)return p;if(/^rtk\s/.test(p))return p;return 'rtk '+p}).join(' ');if(out!==c){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'modify',tool_input:{...s.tool_input,command:out}}))}else{process.exit(0)}"
